title: Add Contact Details tab after login with user name display

requirements.text: After a successful login, automatically navigate the user to a new 'Add Contact Details' screen/tab instead of landing directly on the Dashboard.

quotes: after logging open new tab like add contact deatail

acceptanceCriteria: After a successful phone number login, the app transitions to an 'Add Contact Details' screen.
The Dashboard is not shown until the user completes or skips the contact details step.
The contact details screen is visually distinct (e.g., a full-page card or tab-style layout).

requirements.text: On the 'Add Contact Details' screen, display the logged-in user's name prominently at the top of the page.

quotes: after logging Name Showinh on top

acceptanceCriteria: The user's name is displayed at the top of the Add Contact Details screen after login.
The name text is clearly readable and styled consistently with the app's design.

requirements.text: Create an 'Add Contact Details' form screen with fields for the user to enter their contact information (full name, phone number, email address). Include a 'Save' button to submit and a 'Skip' button to proceed to the Dashboard without saving.

quotes: after logging open new tab like add contact deatail

acceptanceCriteria: The form includes fields for full name, phone number, and email address.
A 'Save' button submits the contact details and then navigates to the Dashboard.
A 'Skip' button allows the user to bypass this step and go directly to the Dashboard.
Basic validation is applied: phone number format and email format are checked before saving.

requirements.text: Store submitted contact details (full name, phone number, email) in the backend so they can be retrieved later.

quotes: after logging open new tab like add contact deatail

acceptanceCriteria: The backend actor has a method to save contact details associated with a user principal.
The backend actor has a method to retrieve contact details for a given principal.
Contact details persist across canister upgrades.

requirements.text: After saving or skipping the contact details step, navigate the user to the main Dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Save' on the contact details form navigates to the Dashboard after successful submission.
Clicking 'Skip' immediately navigates to the Dashboard.
The contact details screen does not reappear on subsequent logins if details have already been saved.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts) or frontend/src/main.tsx.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui/.
All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo as a single actor.
nonGoals: Social login or third-party identity providers.
Email or SMS verification of contact details.
Contact details editing after the initial save (not requested).
Changes to the existing machine CRUD or audit log features.
